headline: Morgan Stanley CEO floats bold $10T wealth opportunity
summary: When a business unit already oversees more than $7 trillion in client assets, most CEOs would focus on defending that position. Not Ted Pick. The Morgan Stanley CEO has raised the bar for the firm's wealth management business, arguing it can grow to $10 trillion in assets on its own. Ted Pick told ...

headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Stock Valuation After Upbeat Estimates AI Stock-Plan Push And Earnings Outlook
summary: Why Morgan Stanley stock is getting extra attention now Morgan Stanley (MS) is drawing fresh interest after analysts raised earnings estimates, research providers shifted to more positive ratings, and the company highlighted momentum in areas like AI enabled stock plan platforms ahead of its July earnings release. See our latest analysis for Morgan Stanley. The 1-month share price return of 10.43% and 90-day share price return of 38.21% point to building momentum, supported by upbeat earnings...

headline: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.
